title: Actually include the config digest in the TOC computation
body:
... as, previously, the commit meessage claimed we do.

Otherwise we could easily deduplicate images with different configs or even different (non-chunked-pulled) layers.

(Full disclosure: I did not actually test this.)

comments.body: @mtrmac looks like you need a rebase, and the Skopeo test seems unhappy.

LGTM
and happy green test buttons.  I'll let @Luap99 coordinate the merge if we get another LGTM

> (Full disclosure: I did not actually test this.)

Can you do a test vendor in podman to see if this breaks anything, if it doesn't break any tests we can merge this anytime without blocking others
Test PR looked good, rebased for another run.
